feedback: The app crashes immediately when I try to open the analytics dashboard on my iPad.
I love the new dark mode! It's so much easier on the eyes.
Can you guys please add an export to PDF feature for the reports? It would save me hours.
The login button sometimes requires me to click it twice before it actually logs me in.
Dashboard takes a solid 10 seconds to load sometimes. Too slow.
I am unable to reset my password using the link sent to my email. It says expired immediately.
We need a way to bulk delete items. Deleting them one by one is ridiculous.
The new search bar is super fast. Great job on the latest update!
Sometimes when I use the app, it just feels a bit weird.
Is there any plan to integrate with Slack? That would be a game changer.
